calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-24-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jessica Kalafati Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per and Anton Kalafati.
Kimberly Robles for Defendant/Appellant Robles Concrete Design

Parties are sworn.

Plaintiff/Respondent testifies on their own behalf.

The following exhibits are introduced:
Exh. 1-Photos of Defendant's flooring work
Exh. 2-Letter from manufacturer
Exh. 3- New flooring work
Exh. 4-Contract with defendant and proof of payment
Exh. 5-Email communication between parties
Exh. 6-text exchanges between parties

Defendant/Appellant testifies on their own behalf.
The following exhibit is introduced:

Exh. A-Email exchange
Plaintiff/Respondent responds.

The Court has clarifying questions for both parties.

Judgment is affirmed in favor of Plaintiff/Respondent

All exhibits are returned to the offering parties.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, not reported, (504).
